steps.title: Multiply both sides by y
steps.content: Multiply both sides by $y$ to clear the denominator: $$y(b - 20) = x$$

steps.title: Distribute and evaluate all choices
steps.content:
Distribute $y$ on the left: $x = by - 20y$. Now check each option:
  • A: $x = \frac{b-20}{y}$ — this divides by $y$ instead of multiplying. Eliminate A.
  • B: $x = by - 20y$ — matches $y(b-20)$ distributed. That matches choice B — B is correct.
  • C: $x = \frac{by-20}{y}$ — only the 20 is divided by $y$, not the entire expression. Eliminate C.
  • D: $x = by - 20$ — the $y$ was not distributed to the $-20$ term. Eliminate D.
